title: Metallic Balloon 50 Pack 12 inch Metallic Rainbow Balloons Birthday Balloons Multicoloured Chrome Balloon for Happy Birthday Party Graduation New Year Baby Shower Events Decorations
features: 【Metallic Chrome Balloons 50 Pack】50PCS 12-inch Thicken latex Multi colour Shiny Balloons, large quantity can meet your daily life, festival or party decorating needs, The weight of each balloons is 2.8g, 20% thicker than ordinary latex balloons, strong and long lasting, less likely to burst, It is an indispensable element for your party.

【Perfect Party Decorations】You can hang or stick these Metallic Colorful Balloons on doors, walls, ceilings, doorways and other places you want to decorate, Be it a birthday, wedding anniversary, baby showers, Valentine's Day, corporate event, graduation party. These coloured balloons are just perfect for all your party decoration needs.
【NON-TOXIC & SAFE】The chrome balloons is made of high-quality environmentally friendly latex material, which is durable, odorless, and safe for children.

【Support Helium&Air】The multicoloured balloons can be filled with helium or air, It is recommended to use pump inflation DO NOT overfill them to prevent popping. You can have these perfect decorations in just a few minutes!

【ATTENTION & WARNING】Avoid direct sunlight, and keep away from sharp objects and excessive friction. ​If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us! we will give you a full refund. Your problem can be solved within 24 hours.
